$comment: c15c shipped <fcntl.h> on macOS — the O_*/F_* per-format constant variants + the reordered 24-byte struct flock variant + the variadic open/fcntl from libSystem. Single arm64-macho target → runs on the macos-latest CI leg. exit 42 iff the macho constant + struct variants were selected (O_CREAT 512, F_RDLCK 1 / F_WRLCK 3, flock sizeof 24). RED-ON-DISABLE: a broken selector hands macho the Linux values (O_CREAT 64) or the Linux flock layout (sizeof 32) → exit 1. Release arm runs the optimizer over the macro-expanded variadic calls + the constant folds.
